raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad peegabje Zedekijus
naëna Dehls/ un dewe Mik
im weenn Plikki/ un fazzija:
rr ta KUNGA Gars no man-
im gahjis ar tew runnaht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Mikkus fazzija: Re-
iqt tu redseti to tai Deena/ kad
no weena Kambara eekjch oh-
a eejt paslehpdaamees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Israëta Keh-
nisch fazzija: Nemmeet Mikku/
n weddeet winnu atpakkat pee
monu ta Pilfsahta Wirjneeku/
pee Joafu ta Kehnina Dehln.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un fakkajt: Ta fakka tas
ehnisch: Leezeet tcho Zeetuma
ammá/ un ehdinajeet to ar
sehdu Maisi un ar Behdu Uh-
ni/ kamehr es ar Meernu attat
eetun.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Mikkus fazzija: Ja
ar Meernu attat atnahkfi/ tad
S KUNGS ne irr zaur man-
m ruñajs/ wehl fazzija wiisch:
laufajt wiſſi Laudis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta zehlabs tas Israëta
hnisch/ un Josawats tas keh-
nisch no Juha us Rahinoru
sch Gileadas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Israëta Kehnisch
zzija us Josawatu: Es pahr-
brbschohs un nahfschu Kar-
/ bet tu apgehrbees ar fatwahin
rehbehm. Un tas Israëta
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tas Sihreexu Keh-
nisch bij Jaweenr Rat-
tu Ahwersteem patwehlejs/ un
fazzijg: Ne lauseetees prett ne
kahdu jeb masn jeb leelu/ ka prett
to Israëta Kehninnu ween.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu to Rattu Ahwer-
sti Josawatu redscja/ tad fazzija
tee/ tas irr tas Israëta Keh-
nisch/ un tee mettehs apkahrt
ns winnu lausdamees. Bet Jo-
sawats brelhze/ un tas KUNGS
palihdseja tam/ un Deews no-
wehrfe tohs no winna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo kad to Rattu Ahwer-
sti redseja/ ka schis tas Israëta
Kehnisch ne bija/ tad tee no
winna atpakkat greesahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet weens Wihrs us-
wilke tawn Stohpu no nejan-
schi/ un schahwe to Israëta Keh-
ninu starp tahm Sprahdsehm
un Kruhfschu-Bruxxahm. Tad
fazzija tas Kehnisch us sawu
Dhrmanni: Greestawu Rohku/
un iswedd mann no tg Lehgera/
jo es efmu eewainohts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta Kaufchana wairo-
jahs tai Deena/ un tas Israëta
Kehnisch stahweja us Jaween
Ratteein teem Sihrexeem pretti/
lihds patt Wakaram/ un nomir-
re/ kad ta Saute nogabje.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
